positive: A whimsical illustration of a glowing, bioluminescent forest floor. Tiny, stylized woodland creatures (foxes, rabbits) interact with giant, glowing mushrooms and delicate ferns. Style of Studio Ghibli mixed with watercolor painting, highly detailed, soft pastel palette, volumetric lighting, magical atmosphere.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh shadows, oversaturated
